title: helia frigida
intro: Helia frigida, also known as the winter heliotrope, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Helia frigida include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Helia frigida can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine.
